sky.dailyTheme: Creative confidence, social magnetism, and bold self-expression.

horoscope.title: Bright Momentum
horoscope.summary: Today rewards visible action and confident movement. Stop waiting for perfect timing and let your energy announce itself.

Aries.metersHero: Energy is blazing — make yourself known.

horoscope.title: Golden Rhythm
horoscope.summary: The day moves best when comfort and confidence work together. Let yourself enjoy attention instead of shrinking from it.

horoscope.title: Social Voltage
horoscope.summary: Your words carry extra magnetism today. A playful message, joke, or unexpected conversation could shift the entire mood.

horoscope.title: Soft Fire
horoscope.summary: You do not need to hide your warmth today. Let people see more of your real excitement instead of protecting every emotion.

Cancer.metersHero: Warmth is strength — open slightly wider.

horoscope.title: Center Stage
horoscope.summary: The sky amplifies your natural signal today. Confidence, charm, and visibility all rise when you stop overthinking your presence.

Leo.metersHero: Your signal is strongest today — be seen.

horoscope.title: Polished Signal
horoscope.summary: Today rewards refinement instead of perfectionism. Clean up the small details, then let the work speak for itself.

Virgo.metersHero: Flow is sharp — refine and release.

horoscope.title: Magnetic Glow
horoscope.summary: Social energy flows naturally around you today. Beauty, confidence, and honesty combine into something people immediately notice.

Libra.metersHero: Charm is amplified — lean into it.

horoscope.title: Hidden Heat
horoscope.summary: There is strong emotional gravity around you today. Stay intentional with your attention because people are reading your energy closely.

Scorpio.metersHero: Intensity is attractive — direct it wisely.

horoscope.title: Wild Spark
horoscope.summary: Movement creates momentum today. Adventure, spontaneity, and saying yes to the unexpected all recharge your signal.

Sagittarius.metersHero: Energy wants motion — follow the spark.

horoscope.title: Visible Build
horoscope.summary: Progress becomes more powerful when people can actually see it. Share the work, show the momentum, and let confidence replace silence.

horoscope.title: Creative Orbit
horoscope.summary: Your originality stands out strongly today. Strange ideas, social risks, and expressive energy all pull the right people closer.

Aquarius.metersHero: Your signal is unique — broadcast it.

horoscope.title: Dreamlight
horoscope.summary: Your imagination feels especially alive today. Turn inspiration into something visible instead of keeping it entirely internal.

Pisces.metersHero: Creativity is flowing — express it outward.

starSync.dailyTheme: Today’s Star Sync energy favors playful courage, visible attraction, creative honesty, and warm confidence over guarded signals.
starSync.pairingNote: Use owner sign as the first sign and other person sign as the second sign.
